untranslatable_reason: Signal requires qualitative price structure identification (support/resistance breaks, swing formations, reversal patterns) which cannot be expressed as mechanical rules with allowed indicators. 'Short-term MA slope shift' requires derivative/change calculation not available in indicator list. 'Lead time bars before MA cross' requires forward-looking price action prediction. Provided translation uses proxy conditions (pivot breaks, MA alignment) but does not capture the core price structure-first philosophy.
translation_notes: Rule emphasizes price action precedence over indicators. Translated using support/resistance proxies (pivot points s1/r1) and MA alignment (sma_10, sma_50, sma_200), but this mechanizes what the author intended as discretionary structure reading. The signal fundamentally requires visual/qualitative price pattern recognition.
